response.title: Telehealth Support Specialist
response.description: HealthConnect Innovations is seeking a motivated Telehealth Support Specialist to join our dynamic team. This entry-level position combines elements of healthcare assistance, customer service, and technology support to enhance patient experiences in a rapidly growing telehealth environment. As a Telehealth Support Specialist, you will assist patients in navigating our telehealth platform, troubleshoot technical issues, and coordinate with healthcare providers to ensure seamless virtual care delivery.

required_skills: Proficiency in using telehealth software platforms (e.g., Zoom for Healthcare, Doxy.me)
Strong verbal communication skills for patient interactions
Ability to troubleshoot common technical issues (e.g., connectivity problems)
Familiarity with patient scheduling and electronic health record (EHR) systems
preferred_skills: Experience with customer service in a healthcare setting
Knowledge of HIPAA compliance and patient confidentiality practices
Basic data entry skills for maintaining patient records
Understanding of remote patient monitoring tools
requirements.education: Associate degree in Health Information Technology, Nursing, or related field
